{"LastUpdate":"2026-07-16 04:50 UTC","Overview":{"ReportDate":"13 July 2026","ReportTime":"8:43 AM","ReportAnnouncements":"","ReportWhatsHappening":"

Whether you’re hitting the slopes, exploring the village or enjoying tobogganing at Windy Corner with Everest Sports, there’s plenty to experience this week.

We have a great lineup of events and activations, including Twilight Tuesdays, Thursday night fireworks, live music and après experiences throughout the resort.

Planning to go tobogganing? Book your Windy Corner session with Everest Sports here

Discover what’s happening across the village. Explore the What’s On page HERE

Hut","CrossCountryDescription":"Fair","CrossCountryGroomed":"Closed"}]},"CrossCountryMaintenance":{"CrossCountryReporterDate":"14 July 2026","CrossCountryComments":"Tonight we were able to get the big machine out on the trails, unfortunately conditions weren't with us, so we had to stay up high. We had a lot of nice snow drifts on McKay loop and Pretty Valley Road. Mt McKay summit road is looking good other than one small patchy area towards the top. High Plains Road has held up fairly well to the weather, the first 100 meters is a bit patchy, but after that is looking nicely covered. For our classic friends, sadly due to the wet conditions we chose not to set any tracks, so as to avoid creating water gullies. Hopefully everything dries out in the next day or so and we can get them sorted for you. With Eagle chair now open, we have access to and from the Village Bowl and there is a chance more terrain will open soon. Keep an eye on the app or website for changes to lift status and terrain. Enjoy the great day coming up, bring the sunscreen and stay safe! ","PatrolForecast":"Areas of frost and the chance of fog this morning. Sunny afternoon.
